abilities.name: Guile of the Cutthroat
abilities.desc: Increases party and raid member's melee and ranged attack power by 5%. Does not stack with similar effects.In addition, increases your damage dealt by 3%.

abilities.name: Dirty Fighter
abilities.desc: Every 2nd critical strike with Skullpiercer or Assault within 30 seconds now transforms your next Assault within 15 seconds into Sucker Punch. Sucker PunchSucker punch an enemy, dealing 291 + 35% AP Physical damage and generating 5 stacks of Advantage. Scales with modifiers to Assault.For 8 seconds, the critical strike chance of Assault is increased by 10%.

abilities.name: Banditry
abilities.desc: Increases your critical strike chance by 2% and Focus regeneration by 15%.

abilities.name: To The Skies!
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Bushcraft Glider by -30 sec.

abilities.name: Elven Tactics
abilities.desc: You now have a -20% chance to not consume Advantage on cast.

abilities.name: Double The Pace
abilities.desc: Increases all party and raid member's melee and ranged haste by 10%. Does not stack with similar effects.In addition, increases your critical strike chance by 2%.

abilities.name: Sniper's Focus
abilities.desc: Consuming Advantage now has a 20% chance per Archery Point spent to refund 20 Focus.

abilities.name: Freedom
abilities.desc: Free up to 10 nearby allies within 15 yds of you for 8 seconds, causing them to become immune to roots and snares, and allowing their critical strikes to increase their movement speed by 30% for 5 seconds.

abilities.name: Survivalist
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Survival Potion by -25%.

abilities.name: Outmaneuver
abilities.desc: Teleport to an enemy, summon a decoy beneath them, and mark them for 8 seconds. Dealing melee damage to them adds a stack to this effect, up to 20 stacks.Reactivating this ability within 8 seconds deals 1 + 55% AP Physical damage to your target, increased by 20% for each stack on the target, and then teleports you back to your decoy.Usable while in Elude.

abilities.name: Venom-Coated Seeds
abilities.desc: Damage dealt by Snapseed now reduces the enemy's chance to hit by -15% for 10 seconds.

abilities.name: Endurance Training
abilities.desc: Increases your maximum Focus by 20.

abilities.name: Assault
abilities.desc: Assault a low health enemy, dealing 100% Weapon Damage (175% with a dagger equipped) plus an additional 8 + 100% AP Physical damage. If the target is bleeding, this deals 50% increased damage.Damage increased for each stack of Advantage.Only usable on enemies below 20% health.

abilities.name: Hunting Tactics
abilities.desc: Damage dealt by Skullpiercer is increased by 30% against Poisoned targets.

abilities.name: Sly
abilities.desc: Your Woodland Adept now triggers a -10% reduced cooldown for each stack of Advantage active when cast.

abilities.name: Archery Master
abilities.desc: Critical strikes with Quick Shot now generate an additional stack of Advantage.

abilities.name: Elusive Character
abilities.desc: Increases your damage dealt by 10% for 12 seconds after leaving Elude.

abilities.name: Highwayman
abilities.desc: Direct critical strikes while behind your target increase your haste by 15% for 5 seconds, or for your next 2 attacks.

abilities.name: Close Quarters
abilities.desc: Increases your attack power and Agility by 3%.

abilities.name: Bounty Hunter
abilities.desc: Damage dealt by Flank and Rusty Shiv now increases the target's damage taken from your Advantage spenders by 25% for 8 seconds.

abilities.name: 'Tactical' Advantage
abilities.desc: Knockout and Bushwhack now increases your damage dealt against the target by 10% for 5 seconds.

abilities.name: Outlaw
abilities.desc: Increases the effectiveness of your Adaptations by 20%.

abilities.name: Pierced
abilities.desc: Critical strikes with Skullpiercer and Precision Shot cause the enemy to bleed for an additional 50% damage of the damage dealt over 4 seconds.

abilities.name: An Arrow for Everything
abilities.desc: Increases the effectiveness of Quivers by 25%.

abilities.name: Natural Disguise
abilities.desc: Instantly dispels all movement slowing effects from allies within 30 yds and transforms them into a bush, stealthing them for 20 seconds.

abilities.name: Adrenaline Rush
abilities.desc: Surge with vitality, dispeling all harmful effects from yourself and increasing your movement speed by 40% for 10 seconds.Usable while stealthed.

abilities.name: Forest Dweller
abilities.desc: While in Elude, gain 20% increased movement speed and regenerate 3% maximum health every 3 sec.

abilities.name: Onslaught
abilities.desc: Your senses heighten, causing you to instantly generate 5 Advantage and allowing the use of abilities that require Elude for 15 seconds.

abilities.name: Assassin
abilities.desc: Increases the effectiveness of Instinct by 25%.

abilities.name: Blow the Horns!
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Horn spells by -25%.

abilities.name: Survival Kit
abilities.desc: Your Survival Potion now also heals you for 10% of your maximum health with each tick.

abilities.name: Throatpunch
abilities.desc: Punch an enemy in the throat, interrupting the enemy's spellcast, preventing any spell from that school of magic from being cast for 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Viper's Bite
abilities.desc: Generates 2 AdvantageUnleash 4 quick strikes over 1 seconds to an enemy, each dealing 85% Weapon Damage.If the target is bleeding, each strike deals an additional 400 + 25% AP Physical damage.If the target is poisoned, each strike deals Nature damage instead of Physical damage.

abilities.name: Swiftshot
abilities.desc: Damage dealt by Precision Shot now increases enemy Physical damage taken by 11% for 10 seconds.

abilities.name: Boots of Elvenkind
abilities.desc: Increases your Agility by 5% and reduces the duration of movement slowing effects on you by -20%.

abilities.name: Maximum Power
abilities.desc: Abilities used with 5 stacks of Advantage now refresh the duration of your active Skirmish by 5 sec.

abilities.name: Blur
abilities.desc: Increases your chance to dodge and parry by 4%.

abilities.name: Survival Expert
abilities.desc: Increases the dodge chance provided by Briar Veil by 25%.

abilities.name: Brutal Shot
abilities.desc: Fire a volley of powerful shots that pierce through Armor, dealing 450% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 300 to all targets in a 40 yd line.While Skirmish is active this ability is guaranteed to critically strike.

abilities.name: Headshots Only
abilities.desc: Periodic damage dealt with Serrated Shot and Toxic Dart now increases the damage of your next Precision Shot within 8 seconds by 10%, stacking 10 times.

abilities.name: Incendiary Shot
abilities.desc: Shoot a burning arrow dealing 791 + 35% ranged AP + 45% fire SP Fire damage to an enemy and up to 5 enemies within 6 yds, and causing your next 3 direct damage Advantage spenders to deal 50% of their damage to nearby enemies.Direct damage increased by 20% for each stack of Advantage.

abilities.name: Mortal Shots
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Crippling Shot by -4 sec.

abilities.name: Guile of the Ranger
abilities.desc: Your Instinct now additionally increases your critical strike rating by 20% of your Agility.

abilities.name: A Quick Demise
abilities.desc: Auto shots now have a 20% chance to extend the duration of your Serrated Shot by 2 sec.

abilities.name: Trueshot Lodge Training
abilities.desc: Increases your off-hand weapon damage by 25%.While wielding a polearm, your Physical damage dealt is increased by 3%.

abilities.name: Falcon Charmer
abilities.desc: Increases the duration of War Falcons by 3 sec.

abilities.name: Thread The Needle
abilities.desc: Critical strikes with Quick Shot or Falconstrike now reduce the cast time and cost of your next ability that consumes Advantage by -34% for 15 seconds, stacking 3 times.

abilities.name: Petalkeeper
abilities.desc: Woodland Arrow now spawns a rare red Dream Flower at a random location near you for 30 seconds.Critical strikes will apply a stack of Petals to red Dream Flowers. PetalsAt 10 stacks, your next Ranger Horn will cause the flower to burst, granting a buff to allies within 20 yards that causes damage dealt to heal them for 10% of the damage dealt and preventing their movement speed from being reduced below 100% of normal speed, for 8 seconds.

abilities.name: Quick-Witted
abilities.desc: Avoiding an attack now causes you to quickly stab an enemy with one of the arrows from your quiver, dealing 1 + 100% AP Physical damage and reducing their attack speed by -20% for 8 seconds.

abilities.name: Crippling Shot
abilities.desc: Fire a crippling shot at an enemy slowing movement speed by -50% and knocking them off their mounts, making them unable to mount again for 5 seconds.

abilities.name: Hunting with Precision
abilities.desc: Your Hunting Shot now deals 25% increased damage for each subsequent target it ricochets to.

abilities.name: Knuckleduster
abilities.desc: Periodic damage dealt now generates 5 Focus.

abilities.name: Briar Veil
abilities.desc: Thorns and leaves swirl around you, masking your movements for 10 seconds, increasing your dodge chance by 50% and causing dodging attacks to restore 2% maximum health and 5 Focus.

abilities.name: Knockout
abilities.desc: Knock an enemy out, incapacitating them for 4 seconds and removing bleed and poison effects from them. Damage caused will interrupt this effect.Usable while in Elude.

abilities.name: Grace
abilities.desc: Increases your Agility and movement speed by 4%.

abilities.name: Deadeye
abilities.desc: Increases the range of your ranged abilities and Auto Shot by 5 yds.

abilities.name: Hunting Shot
abilities.desc: Fire a shot that ricochets between 3 enemies, dealing Ranged Weapon Damage plus 6 to each enemy.Generates 1 stack of Advantage for each enemy hit.

abilities.name: Quills
abilities.desc: Launch darts at up to 5 nearby enemies, dealing 15 + 30% AP Ranged Physical damage.Damage increased and strikes 1 additional target for each stack of Advantage.

abilities.name: Skirmish
abilities.desc: Increases your critical strike chance by 15% and reduces your Focus costs by -25%.Lasts 4 sec for each stack of Advantage.

abilities.name: Instinctual Combatant
abilities.desc: Casting Instinct now also restores 40 extra Focus and guarantees your next 3 Skullpiercers or Assaults within 20 seconds to critically strike.In addition, Instinct now grants you an additional 10% of your Agility as melee attack power.

abilities.name: Corrosive Poison
abilities.desc: Your ranged abilities against Poisoned targets now ignores 25% of enemy armor.

abilities.name: Dirty Blades
abilities.desc: For 4 seconds, your melee auto attacks deal an additional 30% (doubled with a dagger equipped) of the damage dealt as Nature damage and reduces your target's healing received by -20% for 8 seconds, stacking 2 times.Duration increased by 4 sec for each stack of Advantage.Usable while in Elude.

abilities.name: Woodland Stalker
abilities.desc: While in Elude, your critical strike chance is now increased by 20%.

abilities.name: Dirty Fighter
abilities.desc: Increases the chance for Flank to critically strike by 50% and increases your chance to resist root effects by 25%.

abilities.name: Woodland Adept
abilities.desc: Slip into the shadows, entering an improved stealth mode, increases your movement speed by 25% for 10 seconds, and applies Elude.

abilities.name: Lethal Wounds
abilities.desc: Increases the tick rate of your periodic damage effects by -20%.

abilities.name: Serrations
abilities.desc: Increases your damage against bleeding or Poisoned targets by 5%.

abilities.name: Improved Waterskins
abilities.desc: Increases the effectiveness of your Waterskins by 25%.

abilities.name: Survival Potion
abilities.desc: Drink a survival potion, dispelling all poison and disease effects and removing 1 poison and disease effect every 3 sec for 9 seconds.

abilities.name: Ambuscade
abilities.desc: Increases the damage of Skullpiercer and Flank by 20%, plus an additional 35% if you have a polearm equipped.

abilities.name: Hookshot
abilities.desc: Launch a hook at a target attempting to lodge it into an open wound, dealing 66 + 100% AP Physical damage. If the target is bleeding, you can reactivate this to pull yourself to them, dealing 150% Weapon Damage and generating 2 Advantage

abilities.name: Barbed Quills
abilities.desc: Damage dealt by Wild Strike and Quills will now tear into enemies, causing them to bleed for 78 Physical damage over 9 seconds, stacking 4 times.Damage dealt by Quills now spreads your periodic effects to 5 enemies within 10 yds and extends their duration by 2 sec.

abilities.name: Highlander
abilities.desc: Each time you spawn a green Dreamflower you are granted 1 stack of Highlander.Highlander (Stacks)At 3 stacks, your next Falconstrike within 10 seconds deals 25% increased damage and reduces the enemy's healing received by -40% for 8 seconds.

abilities.name: Plumes of War
abilities.desc: Increases the critical strike chance of Falconstrike and Emerald Arrow by 15%.In addition, critical strikes with Falconstrike now increase the damage of subsequent Falconstrikes by 5% for 15 seconds, stacking 5 times.

abilities.name: Cunning
abilities.desc: Increases your Focus regeneration by 15%.

abilities.name: Whipvine Arrow
abilities.desc: Launch an arrow with magical vines attached to it at your target, dealing 78 + 33% ranged AP Nature damage and rooting them for 40 seconds (8 sec vs players). Damage caused may interrupt the effect.Hits 1 additional nearby target per stack of Advantage.

abilities.name: Pecking
abilities.desc: Your War Falcons and Dragonhawks now have a 25% chance to deal additional Physical damage to 3 nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Woodland Arrow
abilities.desc: Shoot a magical arrow, dealing 38 + 35% ranged AP Physical damage and reducing the cooldown of active Horn spells by -15 sec.Damage increased for each stack of Advantage.

abilities.name: Falconstrike
abilities.desc: Every 5th Quick Shot within 15 seconds transforms into Falconstrike.Using a Horn instantly transforms Quick Shot into Falconstrike.Falconstrike (Transform)Generates 2 AdvantageCall a cast of falcons to strike an enemy, dealing 121% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 10 Nature damage and calling 1 War Falcon to your aid for 6 seconds.

abilities.name: Precision Shot
abilities.desc: Precisely shoot an enemy from a great distance, inflicting 38 + 48.5% ranged AP Physical damage.Damage increased for each stack of Advantage.Usable while in Elude.

abilities.name: Ravage
abilities.desc: Generates 1 AdvantageRavage an enemy, causing them to bleed out dealing 112 + 23.72% AP Physical damage over 12 seconds.

abilities.name: Elven Enchantments
abilities.desc: Increases the damage dealt by your Searing and Poison Quivers by 25%.In addition, dealing damage with Searing or Poison Quiver now grants a stack of Elven Enchantments.Elven EnchantmentsCast time of the next Incendiary Shot within 10 seconds is reduced by -10% and critical strike chance increased by 10%, stacking 10 times.

abilities.name: Pathfinder
abilities.desc: Your Adrenaline Rush now incurs a -90% reduced cooldown when used while Elude is active.

abilities.name: Studded Arrows
abilities.desc: Increases the ranged weapon damage dealt by Quick Shot by 10%.

abilities.name: Superb Shot
abilities.desc: Damage dealt by Auto Shot now restores 4 Focus.

abilities.name: Strike Where It Hurts
abilities.desc: Your ability critical strikes now increase the damage the target takes from bleeds by 30% for 15 seconds.

abilities.name: Deadshot
abilities.desc: Generates 2 AdvantageShoot a powerful arrow at the target dealing 250% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 20.1.Only usable on enemies below 20% health.

abilities.name: Hawkeye
abilities.desc: You now fire an arrow every 3 sec at enemies within 30 yds affected by your Hunting Shot, dealing 75% Ranged Weapon Damage.Scales with Hunting Shot modifiers.

abilities.name: Dice Games
abilities.desc: Increases the critical strike chance of Wild Strike and Assault by 5%.

abilities.name: Underhanded
abilities.desc: Increases the attack power scaling of Skullpiercer by 15%.

abilities.name: Stalker
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Cutthroat by -15 sec, but reduces the range of Cutthroat by -10 yds.

abilities.name: Quel'dorei Poison
abilities.desc: Damage dealt by Woodland Arrow and Emerald Arrow now poison enemies for 3 seconds, dealing 91 + 10% ranged AP Nature damage every 1 sec.

abilities.name: Neurotoxin Arrow
abilities.desc: Shoot at an enemy's throat with a toxin-laced arrow, dealing 25 + 36.07% ranged AP Nature damage and silencing them for 1 seconds.Duration increased by 1 sec per stack of Advantage.

abilities.name: Devastating Shots
abilities.desc: Increases your critical strike chance by 2% and your hit chance by 1%.

abilities.name: New-Age Archery
abilities.desc: Increases the damage of Skullpiercer and Precision Shot by 20%.

abilities.name: Improved Serrated Shot
abilities.desc: Increases the damage of Serrated Shot by 30%.

abilities.name: Opportunist
abilities.desc: Increases the critical strike chance of Precision Shot by 50% on enemies above 80% health.

abilities.name: Rapid Strikes
abilities.desc: Melee and ranged auto attacks now have a 25% chance to strike an additional time for 50% of the damage dealt.Can only occur once per sec.

abilities.name: Pinpoint Accuracy
abilities.desc: Critical strikes with direct damaging abilities now generate 4 Focus.

abilities.name: Deft Hands
abilities.desc: Increases your melee and ranged haste by 5%.

abilities.name: Jagged Cuts
abilities.desc: Increases the damage and duration of Toxic Dart and Ravage by 25%.

abilities.name: Camper
abilities.desc: Reduces the cast time of your Bushcraft abilities by -50%.

abilities.name: Snapseed
abilities.desc: Toss a snapseed at an enemy, dealing 27 + 30% ranged AP Physical damage and knocking them back.

abilities.name: Resourceful
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Crippling Shot and Snapseed by -20%.

abilities.name: Cutthroat
abilities.desc: Shoot a powerful arrow that deals Weapon Damage plus 40 and stuns the target for 1 seconds. Duration increased by 1 sec per stack of Advantage.

abilities.name: Stonemason's Secret
abilities.desc: Your Skullpiercer used with 5 stacks of Advantage now extends the duration of Dirty Blades by 6 sec.

abilities.name: Phoenix Plumes
abilities.desc: Your Skullpiercers and Woodland Arrows used with 5 stacks of Advantage now restore 3% Focus and summon a War Falcon for 6 seconds.

abilities.name: Thalassian Brand
abilities.desc: Mark an enemy for total destruction, increasing your allies ranged attack power against the target by 300 and dealing 1120 Nature damage every 3 sec for 15 seconds.The marked target can always be seen by the Ranger whether it stealths or turns invisible

abilities.name: Falcon's Call
abilities.desc: Call down war falcons upon a targeted area, slowing up to 8 enemies within the area by -60% for 5 seconds.A Falcon is summoned for each enemy affected for 12 seconds.

abilities.name: Coordination
abilities.desc: Your War Falcons and Dragonhawks now grant you a stack of Coordination when they deal damage.Coordination (Proc)Increases your critical strike chance and critical damage by 1% for 15 seconds, stacking 10 times.

abilities.name: Backstep
abilities.desc: Leap backwards up to 10 yds.

abilities.name: Forest Herald
abilities.desc: Casting Toxic Dart and abilities that spend stacks of Advantage now have a 20% chance to spawn a green Dreamflower at a random location nearby within 15 yds of you.Dream Flower (Spawner)When an ally runs over the flower, they consume it to heal for 3% maximum health and gain 40% increased movement speed for 5 seconds.

abilities.name: Snatch
abilities.desc: Snatch an enemy's melee weapons, disarming them for 4 seconds.If you are disarmed, you also return your weapon to yourself.

abilities.name: Windrunner's Reach
abilities.desc: Increases the range of your ranged abilities by 5 yds.In addition, your critical strike chance against Undead, Beasts, and Dragonkin is increased by 2%.

abilities.name: Falcon's Aid
abilities.desc: Periodic damage dealt now has a 10% chance to summon a War Falcon to aid you in battle for 6 seconds.

abilities.name: Razorquills
abilities.desc: Increases the tick rate of Toxic Dart and Emerald Arrows by -20%.

abilities.name: Dragonhawk Tamer
abilities.desc: Using a Horn now summons a Dragonhawk to assist you in combat for 15 seconds.

abilities.name: Forest Fighter
abilities.desc: Your Skullpiercers or Emerald Arrows used with 5 stacks of Advantage now reduce the cooldown of Woodland Arrow by -5 sec.

abilities.name: Light Arrows / Masterful Archery
abilities.desc: Increases the damage of Precision Shot by 20% when used from 40 yds or further away from your target.

abilities.name: Silent, But Deadly / One Shot, One Kill
abilities.desc: Direct Physical damage dealt now has an 8% chance to allow you to use Deadshot regardless of the targets health for 8 seconds.

abilities.name: Bloody Focus / No Mercy
abilities.desc: Reduces the Focus cost of Toxic Dart by -15.

abilities.name: Guise / Lethal Cunning
abilities.desc: Instantly generates 5 stacks of Advantage and allows you see nearby stealthed enemies for 5 seconds.Usable while stealthed.

abilities.name: Whats Yours Is Mine / Grappling Arrows
abilities.desc: Removes the Focus cost of Snatch.

abilities.name: Surefooted / Heightened Senses
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Adrenaline Rush by -30 sec.

abilities.name: Assassin / Excessive But Necessary
abilities.desc: Increases the duration of Knockout and Crippling Shot by 1 sec.

abilities.name: Focused Fighter / Wild Man
abilities.desc: Reduces the Focus cost of Flank, Blackjack, and Wild Strike by -10%.

abilities.name: Polearm Craft / Pilfering
abilities.desc: While a polearm is equipped, your chance to trigger your Weapon Crafts and their damage dealt is increased by 25%.

abilities.name: Tip of the Spear / Marked for Death
abilities.desc: While you have a polearm equipped, your Wild Strike now has a 15% chance to strike 3 additional times.

abilities.name: Horn of War / Battle Prowess
abilities.desc: Generates 1 AdvantageEmanate an aura for 30 seconds that grants 5% increased critical strike chance to party and raid members. Does not stack with similar effects.While active, you generate 3 Focus every 1 sec.

abilities.name: War Falconer / Aerial Assault
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldowns of Falcon's Call by -30 sec.

abilities.name: Falcon Guide / Scavenger
abilities.desc: Falconstrike and Battle Screech now increase your movement speed by 30% for 3 seconds.

abilities.name: Emerald Arrow / Falcon Diving
abilities.desc: Set up a powerful magical arrow and then shoot it, dealing 10 + 20% ranged AP Nature damage to the target, increased for each stack of Advantage.Creates an enchanted flare on the ground, causing nearby enemies to take 224 + 20% ranged AP Nature damage every 2 sec, lasting 2 sec for each stack of Advantage.

abilities.name: Gutpiercer / Battle Screech
abilities.desc: Damage dealt by War Falcons and Dragonhawks now has a 15% chance to reduce the enemy's resistances by 75 and increase their Magic damage taken by -2% for 15 seconds.

abilities.name: Wingman / Guidance
abilities.desc: Reduces all damage taken by -2% for each War Falcon or Dragonhawk you have active.

abilities.name: Defense of the Ancients / Horn of Alacrity
abilities.desc: You now emanate an aura around you, increasing the Armor of party and raid members by 390.Does not stack with similar effects.

abilities.name: Frenzy / Command Aura
abilities.desc: Enrage all nearby allies, increasing their haste by 30% for 20 seconds.After being affected by this spell, allies cannot benefit from similar effects for 5 minutes.
